name: design-doc
description: Run an assumptions-first architecture design — registers with stable IDs (A#/DQ#/V#), decision-by-question rounds with a recorded escape hatch, a mid-process adversarial review, a library of quantitative components (request paths, load ceilings, number tables) whose estimates are gated on named spikes — and ship the result as an interactive single-file HTML doc plus a generated PDF, written as a humble proposal that explains and asks for feedback rather than sells.
